title: montia exigua var. viridis
intro: Montia exigua var. viridis, also known as green purslane, is a variety of the purslane plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family and is native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of green purslane include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Green purslane can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
